message:
🌱 Add open-webui: feat: configurable OpenAI API endpoint. mission (#1351)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-230-feat-configurable-openai-api-endpoint",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: feat: configurable OpenAI API endpoint.",
+    "description": "feat: configurable OpenAI API endpoint.. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
helm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui
```
Make the API endpoint url configurable so the user can connect other OpenAI-compatible APIs with the web-ui.

Make it configurable through environment variables or add a new field in the **Settings** > **Add-ons**."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: configurable OpenAI API endpoint.",
+        "description": "hoping to be able to contribute more, you've got the best UI going for Ollama **AND** ChatGPT/Mistral APIs right now. There's a lot of people getting interested in running local inference or using the API for privacy and solutions like this are key enablers. Here's to more in 2024! 🎉🚀
```yaml
curl -s  https://api.together.xyz/v1/models -H "Content-Type: application/json"  -H "Authorization: Bearer 1bef28e8a23fa3a11xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"|jq
[
  {
    "id": "Austism/chronos-hermes-13b",
    "object": "model",

    "created": 1693943905
  },
  {
    "id": "Meta-Llama/Llama-Guard-7b",
    
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "feat: configurable OpenAI API endpoint." is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "hoping to be able to contribute more, you've got the best UI going for Ollama **AND** ChatGPT/Mistral APIs right now.
